name: AIDLC Dashboard
description: Dashboard improvements — built using AIDLC on itself
projectContext:
AIDLC Dashboard is a locally running Next.js 15 web application for managing 
AI-Driven Development Lifecycle projects. It runs at localhost:7777 and provides 
project management, spec editing, spec execution with live streaming output, 
execution history, undo, and config editing.

Stack: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript (strict), Tailwind CSS, Zustand for state,
Server-Sent Events for streaming, filesystem-based storage (no database).

Architecture: All project data stored as JSON in data/projects/. Specs read/written 
directly from project specDir on disk. Execution logs written to project logsDir.
API routes in src/app/api/. Components in src/components/. 
Runs at localhost:7777 via npm run dev.
constraints: Never hardcode file paths — always use path.resolve()
Never import unused variables types or modules
All colors use Tailwind classes — never hardcoded hex
Components accept variant props not style props
API routes use async params pattern for Next.js 15
